description: Code/tool dependency ledger (not art). Exact npm/registry evidence as of 2026-07-10. Re-pin at implementation.

dependencies.name: three
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Rendering and loaders only; not physics authority

dependencies.name: @dimforge/rapier3d-deterministic-compat
dependencies.versionPin: 0.19.3 (npm latest 2026-07-10); pin exact version at implement; re-hash WASM/JS on upgrade
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Simulation authority; fixed-step world.step only
dependencies.maintenanceEvidence: npm 0.19.3 published lineage Nov 2025; Apache-2.0; active dimforge
dependencies.integrationRisk: medium — WASM size/init; bundler must use compat init path
dependencies.determinismCaveats: Official JS guide: WASM/TS Rapier is fully cross-platform deterministic when same version, same construction order, same initial conditions; transcendental JS Math not deterministic across platforms — avoid Math.sin/cos for sim inputs; snapshot MD5 comparable across machines.
dependencies.cycle1DefectNote: Cycle 1 often wrote bare '@dimforge/rapier3d-deterministic' while linking the -compat npm URL. Both packages exist on npm at 0.19.3; cycle 2 selects -compat explicitly for Vite/WebView2 inlined WASM.
dependencies.notes: Do not use nonexistent or ambiguous package names in new specs.

dependencies.name: @dimforge/rapier3d-deterministic
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Same sim authority if selected; requires WASM file bundling
dependencies.maintenanceEvidence: npm 0.19.3; exists as separate package (not nonexistent)
dependencies.integrationRisk: medium — explicit .wasm asset handling in Vite
dependencies.rejectionReason: Not primary: separate WASM less convenient for first WebView2 host; keep as alt if base64 payload size becomes issue
dependencies.notes: Cycle-1 bare name was not 'nonexistent' on registry; defect was mixed identity with -compat URL and incomplete install strategy.

dependencies.name: @dimforge/rapier3d
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Not selected primary
dependencies.rejectionReason: Prefer deterministic-labeled package for golden traces; official docs state JS Rapier is deterministic, but explicit deterministic package reduces ambiguity

dependencies.name: vite
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Bundler/dev server only

dependencies.name: fast-check
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Property-based tests for ContactFrame streams; not shipped to players

dependencies.name: vitest
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Unit/golden tests

dependencies.name: three-mesh-bvh
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Render-mesh queries / camera collision helpers; must not replace Rapier
dependencies.integrationRisk: low-medium — accidental dual physics if misused

dependencies.name: @gltf-transform/cli
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Offline asset optimize only

dependencies.name: gltfpack / meshoptimizer
dependencies.versionPin: pin-at-build to tagged release; re-verify MIT LICENSE
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Offline mesh compression

dependencies.name: KTX-Software / toktx
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Texture encode to KTX2

dependencies.name: spectorjs
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: WebGL debug capture; not default production runtime

dependencies.name: Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime
dependencies.installIdentifier: WebView2 Evergreen Runtime + Microsoft.Web.WebView2 NuGet for .NET host
dependencies.versionPin: evergreen + pin WebView2 SDK NuGet at implement
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Native host shell Chromium view; messaging to game
dependencies.notes: Transport: PostWebMessageAsJson primary; SharedBuffer if G3 fails

dependencies.name: .NET 8 Windows host
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Touchpad bridge, packaging, focus, host APIs — not game sim
dependencies.selectedAlternative: Rust host + WebView2 bindings (switch trigger: HID memory-safety dominates)

dependencies.name: RawInput.Touchpad (emoacht)
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Study HID patterns only; not a product library
dependencies.rejectionReason: Sample app, not ContactFrame game bridge
dependencies.notes: Optional third_party/reference copy only if minimal files needed later

dependencies.name: AbsoluteTouchEx
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Negative example
dependencies.rejectionReason: Process injection / absolute pad→screen model unsuitable and security-hostile

dependencies.name: cannon-es
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Not selected
dependencies.rejectionReason: Rapier chosen for official JS determinism guidance and active 3D tooling fit

dependencies.name: Electron
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Packaging fallback shell + N-API native module for touchpad
dependencies.notes: Only if WebView2 packaging path fails product needs

dependencies.name: Godot_Skate (3deric)
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Study grind/path algorithms only; not a product library
dependencies.maintenanceEvidence: active prototype repo; MIT LICENSE present
dependencies.selectedAlternative: Reimplement grind latch in Rapier BoardController
dependencies.rejectionReason: Kinematic CharacterBody + gamepad grind button; not dual-foot ContactFrame board body

dependencies.name: Godot-Easy-Vehicle-Physics (DAShoe1)
dependencies.ownershipBoundary: Study raycast wheel pattern for Model B probe only
dependencies.selectedAlternative: Map concepts to Rapier impulses if P3 needs Model B
dependencies.rejectionReason: Godot vehicle stack not selected runtime
